prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-FLEXIDUSTER-PARENT Product Type: DUST_REMOVAL_TOOL Brand (from catalog): Universal Tool Existing Title: Telescopic Flexible Extending Microfiber Duster for Home and Office Cleaning Description: This Microfiber fabric grips to dust. Various colors of blue, purple, green, orange, and pink for a custom touch.

The telescopic body of 5 separate sections extends to 30 in, collapses to 11 in, and the head itself it 5-1/2 in. The duster head is flexible so you can get into corners and hard to reach areas with ease.

Keep this item around to not have to worry about those pesky cobwebs that loom over head. Search Terms: microfiber duster cleaning dirt furniture wood window counter shelf cabinet extending extendable Features: - Various colors: Pink, Purple, Orange, Green, and Blue that we ship at random unless requested. - Comfortable grip allows for easy hand control - Extends to 30 in and collapses to 11 in - The head cover is removable and machine washable - Great item for around the house or office workspace === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Universal Tool Telescopic Microfiber Duster, Extends to 30 in

openai.item_name: Universal Tool Telescopic Flexible Extending Microfiber Duster

anthropic.title_differentiation: Extends To 30 In, Collapses To 11 In, Flexible Head, Machine Washable, Multiple Colors

openai.title_differentiation: Extends To 30 In, Flexible Head Reaches Corners, Removable Machine Washable Cover, Comfortable Grip, Cobweb Removal
